opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My skin is so dry and incredibly itchy that I've been scratching until I bleed, and I haven't slept in two days.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The itch has become unbearable over the last couple of days and I'm completely wrecked from no sleep — I need something to stop it.

symptom_narrative.onset: the itch and dryness have been there on and off for a long time, but it flared up badly about two days ago after the weather turned cold and dry
symptom_narrative.duration: chronic background problem, severe flare for the past 48 hours
symptom_narrative.character: intense, relentless itching with dry, flaky, red patches; I've scratched some areas raw and they've bled
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the itch is the worst it has ever been — I can't stop scratching even when I try
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: mostly in the creases of my elbows and behind my knees; my skin is dry and scaly all over, but my groin and underarms are fine
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worse at night, which is why I can't sleep
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing has helped — the moisturizer I've been using does nothing
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: scratching, the dry heating in my flat, and hot showers seem to set it off
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no fever, no blisters, no yellow weeping or crusting — just dry, itchy, scratched skin
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had dry itchy skin like this for years, it comes and goes
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I haven't slept for two days, I'm exhausted and really irritable, and the itch is constantly on my mind

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing dry, itchy skin that flares from time to time

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a scented commercial moisturizer I've been putting on with no relief

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; flat is heated with a dry heat source and there is no humidifier; high distress from the constant itch and lack of sleep

objective_data_offered.value: red, dry, scaly patches in the creases of both elbows and behind both knees, with scratch marks and a few spots that have bled; some skin looks thickened and leathery on my wrists and neck
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-shown on video/photo; lighting and camera quality limit assessment and cannot exclude early infection

objective_data_offered.value: I checked my temperature at home and it was normal — I don't have a fever
